name: execute_disable_bit63_overlaps_addr
reason: Bit 63 is the execute-disable flag AND the MSB of the raw usize — MEM_MASK strips it from the address, but a raw value with bit 63 set gets silently split between permission and address without any warning that the original value exceeded the physical address space
